migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='culture_protocols' AND column_name='social_class'

verificationResult.note: social_class column added to culture_protocols (NOT NULL DEFAULT 'universal') with check constraint. content_coverage table created. Scenarios columns were already present.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT ambition_level, COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE ambition_level IN ('curious','aspirational','distinguished') GROUP BY ambition_level

verificationResult.note: Zero legacy rows — all production users have a valid current ambition_level value (casual/professional/diplomatic)

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('learning_track_questions','learning_track_progress') ORDER BY table_name

verificationResult.note: Both tables exist with all required indexes: ltq_lookup_idx, ltq_hash_idx (unique), ltp_user_with_pillar_idx (partial, pillar IS NOT NULL), ltp_user_no_pillar_idx (partial, pillar IS NULL)

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT region_code, is_published FROM compass_regions WHERE region_code IN ('NL','CA','PT','ZA') ORDER BY region_code

verificationResult.note: All 21 ACTIVE_REGIONS now have is_published=true and en-GB content.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name IN ('badges','user_badges') ORDER BY table_name

verificationResult.note: badges table seeded with 568 rows (21 regions × pillars/phase/country + ambassador). Seed SQL is now embedded in the migration file (ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING). user_badges has UNIQUE(user_id, badge_id).

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='learning_track_progress' AND column_name='region_code'

verificationResult.note: region_code TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GB' added. Partial unique indexes rebuilt to include region_code, enabling per-region progress tracking. Phase/country badge prerequisites are now correctly scoped by region.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='translations' AND column_name='calibrated_module'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS count, region_code FROM cultural_origins GROUP BY region_code ORDER BY region_code

verificationResult.note: 15 cultural origin records seeded (5 per region: GB, CN, CA). Indexes co_region_code_idx and co_region_domain_idx created. ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING ensures idempotent re-runs.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='culture_protocols' AND column_name IN ('reviewed_by','reviewed_at') ORDER BY column_name

verificationResult.note: reviewed_by (TEXT nullable) and reviewed_at (TIMESTAMPTZ nullable) added to culture_protocols for CC approval/deletion audit trail.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name='cc_protocol_removals'

verificationResult.note: cc_protocol_removals table created to permanently record audit info for every hard-deleted CC protocol record (actor id, timestamp, and key snapshot fields).

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='users' AND column_name='profiling_consent'

verificationResult.note: profiling_consent boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true added to users table. GDPR Art. 21 opt-out — when false, Bolton/EQ/Mehrabian profile writes are suppressed in noble_score submit route. Default true preserves existing behaviour for all existing users.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT conname FROM pg_constraint WHERE conrelid = 'users'::regclass AND conname = 'users_ambition_level_check'

verificationResult.note: CHECK constraint users_ambition_level_check added to users.ambition_level, allowing only 'casual', 'professional', 'diplomatic'. Invalid inserts now raise a constraint violation error. All existing rows already comply (backfilled in migration 0002).

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT region_code, COUNT(*) AS count FROM cultural_origins GROUP BY region_code ORDER BY region_code

verificationResult.note: Seeded 5 cultural-origin records for each of the 17 priority Compass regions (JP, DE, FR, IT, BE, CH, SG, IN, MX, BR, ES, CO, AE, US, NL, PT, ZA), bringing total to 20 regions × 5 records = 100 rows. Added unique index co_region_tradition_unique to make re-runs idempotent on (region_code, tradition). Renumbered from 0013 during rebase because upstream main also added a 0013.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='scenarios' AND column_name='correction_style_i18n'

verificationResult.note: correction_style_i18n jsonb column added to scenarios. Stores per-language translations of the bespoke correction_style mentor tip used by /api/noble-score/submit. English fallback remains the canonical correction_style column. Backfilled all 3 existing rows × 9 languages (27 translations) via scripts/correction-style-translate.mjs. Renumbered from 0014 during rebase because upstream main also added a 0014.

migrations.verificationQuery: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='companion_messages' ORDER BY ordinal_position

verificationResult.note: companion_messages table created with columns id, link_id, sender_id, recipient_id, body, read_at, created_at. Indexes on recipient_id and link_id. Supports task-204 freeform notes between linked companions.
